headline: Discontinued Mountain Dew flavor returns exclusively at Walmart
summary: Every major product seemingly has people who consider that item their personal favorite. My grandfather, for example, drank Moxie, a very strong soda flavor that was a New England staple. headline: Prediction: Up 16% YTD, Coca-Cola Has More Upside
summary: Our Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) outlook leans constructive after a clean Q1 2026 beat, a raised full-year EPS guide, and a stock that has quietly logged a 15.59% year-to-date gain. The 24/7 Wall St. price target for Coca-Cola is $87.01 over the next 12 months, implying 8.41% upside from $80.26. Our model rates KO a buy with ... Prediction: Up 16% YTD, Coca-Cola Has More Upside
